{{CargoRelic
|name=Niten Ichi Ryu
|class_id=20045
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Niten Ichi Ryu is the dual-wielding style of Mushashi. Niten refers to the sun and the moon, the Yin and the Yang, while Niten Ichi means wielding the two swords as one. Practitioners typically hold a katana on their right and a wakizashi on their left.
|fame=29
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail ATK +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +30
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
